title: KKTN-018 business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Alice 20 years old Alice Toyonaka
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is Alice, whose off-shoulder plain clothes are already sexy. She shyly showed me the fridge, but the staff knows, this is the fridge of a child who is cooking properly! It's an explosion age! Alice, who says, "I like electric machines the most among toys," can't stop feeling comfortable once she gets it, and she sweats and gets excited at a great pace. Keep an eye on her expression that is getting more and more naughty!
